title: pilosella mollicaulis subsp. orthochaeta
intro: Pilosella mollicaulis subsp. orthochaeta is a subspecies of the Pilosella mollicaulis plant, also known as a type of dandelion. It is a herbaceous plant with medicinal properties, particularly in its roots and leaves, which contain compounds that have anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Pilosella mollicaulis subsp. orthochaeta include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce blood pressure, and act as a natural laxative. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas and tinctures, are often used to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome and other gastrointestinal problems.
